description: Create a control panel internal layout drawing in LibreCAD (units: millimeters) and save it to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/control_panel_layout.dxf. The drawing requires a 600mm x 800mm backplate (BACKPLATE layer, White/Black) starting at (0,0) and 40mm wide wire ducts (WIREDUCT layer, Green) inset 20mm from the perimeter. Three 35mm high DIN rails (DINRAIL layer, Cyan) must span from X=80 to X=520 at Y coordinates 650, 400, and 150. Components (COMPONENTS layer, Red) include a Main Breaker (60x70) at X=100 and PLC (90x70) at X=200 on the top rail; three Contactors (55x55) at X=100, 200, and 300 on the middle rail; and a Terminal Block Strip (300x40) at X=100 on the bottom rail. The drawing must include labels (LABELS layer, Yellow) for QF1, PLC1, KM1, KM2, KM3, TB1 and the title 'MOTOR CONTROL PANEL - INTERNAL LAYOUT', along with dimensions (DIMENSIONS layer, Magenta) for overall width, height, and at least one vertical rail position.
